Artisanal Winery — Valpolicella

The soul of Valpolicella, in every glass

Artisanal wines born from hand-tended vineyards, where family tradition and patience turn into elegance.

View full catalog

Our Story

A family craft, cultivated over time

For generations, the Crine family has tended to these vineyards in the heart of Valpolicella. Every bottle is the result of artisanal choices, hand-picked harvests, and a long rest in the barrel cellar.

Meet the winery

Territory & Oil

Valpolicella beyond the glass

Among vineyards, olive trees, and rolling hills, the winery tells an agricultural story that brings wine and extra virgin olive oil together in one identity.

Discover the territory
